summary: PRED-TOROID-003 should change from our_verdict=unfalsifiable to our_verdict=standard_physics. The prediction IS testable (curmudgeon was right) but the dome derivation has two fatal internal contradictions: (1) stated eccentricity e=0.66 gives ratio 0.142, not the claimed 0.0215 (6.6x error), and (2) the derivation uses the globe 7.83 Hz instead of the dome own ~22 Hz. Also set data_predates_registration=true. New detail_reasoning and tldr provided in expansion file.
